included: expected governance state derived from the governance ledger plan
BigQuery rowAccessPolicies.list, dataPolicies.list and tables.getIamPolicy readback metadata
principal redaction in generated reconciliation artifacts
standard reconciliation states for in_sync, missing_intent, unmanaged_actual, mismatch, retained_on_overwrite and requires_review

decision.planner_behavior: Rendered GCP bundles with governance intent include a non-mutating governance_reconciliation artifact alongside the governance_ledger artifact. The artifact defines expected state, native readback surfaces and comparison states. The CLI command can execute readback and comparison, but does not apply or repair governance.
decision.promotion_boundary: This closes reconciliation artifact planning and the non-mutating command surface. Auto-repair, governance-object deletion, overwrite-retention and restricted-principal enforcement loops remain separate review gates.
